name: mhc_class_I_core_chr19
description: Zebrafish MHC: core MHC class I region on chr19 (mhc1uba/uda) — the principal classical class I cluster. Unlike tetrapods, zebrafish MHC class I and class II are unlinked and dispersed across multiple chromosomes — the canonical 'MHC region' concept does not apply. Each subfamily has 5-30 paralogs with intra-cluster identity 75-95%. High population polymorphism: >100 alleles described per locus.
